nasb.text: Thus the word of Samuel came to all Israel. Now Israel went out to meet the Philistines in battle and camped beside Ebenezer while the Philistines camped in Aphek.

esv.text: And the word of Samuel came to all Israel. Now Israel went out to battle against the Philistines. They encamped at Ebenezer, and the Philistines encamped at Aphek.

cnv.text: 撒母耳的話傳遍了以色列。那時，以色列人出去迎戰非利士人，他們靠近以便以謝安營，非利士人卻在亞弗安營。

ccb.text: 那时，以色列人去迎战非利士人，他们在以便以谢扎营，非利士人在亚弗扎营。
